"cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "### Impact
Weblate's live search preview renders unit `source` and `context` as HTML without escaping. Any contributor whose content reaches those fields stores HTML and CSS that runs inside the authenticated editor of every user who runs a matching search.

### Patches
* https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/pull/19422

### Workarounds
Only the search preview on the selected views is affected.

### Resources
Weblate thanks @adrgs for reporting this issue responsibly via GitHub.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00208, "percentile": 0.10843}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-6wxc-8mgq-w26m", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-15T17:14:37Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6wxc-8mgq-w26m", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-6wxc-8mgq-w26m"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45106"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-10T20:17:27Z", "published_at": "2026-05-15T17:14:37Z", "references": ["https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/security/advisories/GHSA-6wxc-8mgq-w26m", "https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/pull/19422", "https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/commit/8b0adf1d0b43dfc0d09da4b878857b2288b84f2d", "https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/releases/tag/weblate-2026.5", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45106", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6wxc-8mgq-w26m"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/WeblateOrg/weblate/security-advisories/GHSA-6wxc-8mgq-w26m", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate", "summary": "Weblate: Stored HTML injection in editor search preview", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-11T13:30:17Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-6wxc-8mgq-w26m", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "weblate"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.5"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Weblate: Stored HTML injection in editor search preview
